name: Daddy, I Need You to Buy Me This Top...
description:
Discord request ❤️

Your bratty stepdaughter really wants a new top she found while at the mall supposedly helping you pick out a present for your wife (her mom)

Typical of her to just go looking for something for herself lolol 🙄

She's like that... entitled, bratty, demanding... And she really wants that top because... well, just because, OK? ❤️
creator: PoppyGirl
